profile.name: Alex Rivera
profile.objective: Backend engineer with six years of experience building reliable APIs and data pipelines. I care about clear system design, observability, and mentoring junior developers. Looking for a team where thoughtful engineering and steady delivery matter more than hype.

work.title: Senior Backend Engineer
bullets: Led migration of billing service from a monolith to event-driven microservices, cutting payout failures by 38%
Designed PostgreSQL schemas and caching strategy that reduced median API latency from 420ms to 95ms
Introduced OpenTelemetry tracing and SLO dashboards used by three product squads

work.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built HIPAA-compliant patient intake APIs in Go and deployed them on Kubernetes
Owned on-call rotation for scheduling services with 99.95% uptime over 18 months
Partnered with security team to roll out OAuth2 and scoped service accounts

projects.name: LedgerLite
projects.description: Open-source double-entry bookkeeping CLI with CSV import and plain-text reports.

projects.name: QueueSmith
projects.description: Toy job-queue simulator used in a conference talk on backpressure and retry policies.

achievements.name: Internal hackathon winner
achievements.description: Shipped a prototype fraud-detection rules engine adopted by the payments team.

bullets: Go, Python, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, gRPC, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Grafana
